generated_oml:
instance PhysicalCraneSystem : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:contains CraneFrame, CartStepperMotor, HoistStepperMotor, Electromagnet, SwingAngleEncoder, Anemometer, ArduinoController, PowerSupplyUnit
]

instance CraneFrame : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Structural frame of the gantry crane system"
]

instance CartStepperMotor : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "TMC4671-Eval controlled stepper motor for horizontal cart movement"
]

instance HoistStepperMotor : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "TMC4671-Eval controlled stepper motor for vertical hoist movement"
]

instance Electromagnet : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Electromagnet for container handling at hoist end"
]

instance SwingAngleEncoder : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Measures hoist swing motion using encoder"
    DTDFVocab:producedData SwingAngleDataTransmitted
]

instance Anemometer : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Measures wind speed for environmental monitoring"
    DTDFVocab:producedData WindSpeedDataTransmitted
]

instance ArduinoController : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Microcontroller managing sensor readings and actuator control"
]

instance PowerSupplyUnit : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Power supply unit for the gantry crane system"
]

instance SwingAngleDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom SwingAngleEncoder
]

instance WindSpeedDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom Anemometer
]

instance HistoricalCraneData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Time-series data of crane operations including swing angle and wind speed measurements"
    DTDFVocab:fromData SwingAngleDataTransmitted, WindSpeedDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo TimescaleDB
]

instance GantryCraneCADModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "CAD model of the gantry crane system created in Autodesk Fusion 360"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo PythonGantrylib
]

instance KinematicModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Kinematic model used for trajectory generation and simulation"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo PythonGantrylib
]

instance TimescaleDB : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Time-series database system for storing and querying crane operation data"
    DTDFVocab:enables DatabaseService
]

instance Grafana : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Visualization platform for real-time crane data monitoring"
    DTDFVocab:enables DashboardService
]

instance EclipseMosquittoMQTTBroker : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "MQTT broker for real-time sensor data streaming"
    DTDFVocab:enables MQTTBrokerService
]

instance PythonGantrylib : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Python library for crane control and simulation"
    DTDFVocab:enables TrajectoryGeneratorService, SimulationService, ContinuousValidationService
]

instance DockerContainerization : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Docker-based containerized environment for all digital twin services"
    DTDFVocab:enables DatabaseService, DashboardService, TrajectoryGeneratorService, SimulationService, ContinuousValidationService, MQTTBrokerService
]

instance DatabaseService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service for logging and retrieving historical crane data to TimescaleDB"
    DTDFVocab:provides DataRetrievalInsight
]

instance DashboardService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Grafana-based dashboard for real-time visualization of crane operations"
    DTDFVocab:provides RealTimeVisualizationInsight
]

instance TrajectoryGeneratorService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service for generating optimal crane trajectories using kinematic models"
    DTDFVocab:provides TrajectoryOptimizationInsight
]

instance SimulationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service for simulating crane trajectories and validating against real-time data"
    DTDFVocab:provides SimulationValidationInsight
]

instance ContinuousValidationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service comparing real-time measurements with simulations for continuous validation"
    DTDFVocab:provides FaultLocalizationInsight, ThresholdBreachedNotification
]

instance MQTTBrokerService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service managing MQTT communication between physical sensors and virtual components"
    DTDFVocab:provides DataStreamingInsight
]

instance FaultLocalizationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Fault detection and localization using time series classification techniques"
]

instance TrajectoryOptimizationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Optimized trajectory recommendations based on simulation and real-time data"
]

instance ThresholdBreachedNotification : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Automatic notification when operational thresholds are breached for adjustments"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance DataRetrievalInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Insight for retrieving historical data from TimescaleDB"
]

instance RealTimeVisualizationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Real-time visualization of crane system data through Grafana"
]

instance SimulationValidationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Insight from simulation results compared with real-time data"
]

instance DataStreamingInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Insight related to MQTT data streaming between physical and virtual components"
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "Optimal trajectory commands generated by the Trajectory Generator Service transmitted through the Control Application to the Physical Crane Interface, which controls the motors and electromagnet for movement execution."
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "Real-time continuous synchronization with data logging and validation performed at operational speeds, where measurements and simulations are compared continuously during crane operation."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "Orchestration of physical crane hardware, Python-based control and logging applications, Docker-containerized services (database, dashboard, MQTT), and digital twin services (trajectory generation, simulation, validation) working in a centralized architecture."
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "Primarily operates in the 'as operated' lifecycle stage, supporting continuous validation and fault detection during real-time crane operation."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "Continuous validation service compares real-time measurements against simulated trajectories using distance metrics and threshold checks to ensure model validity during operation."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "MQTT protocol for inter-service communication; Python interface for physical crane control; TimescaleDB for data storage."
]

instance dt_hosting_deployment : DTDFVocab:Deployment [
    base:desc "Docker containerized components (database, MQTT broker, Grafana dashboard) deployed on a single personal computer via docker-compose."
]
